name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝙔𝙤𝙪 𝙟𝙪𝙨𝙩 𝙜𝙤𝙩𝙩𝙖 𝙨𝙞𝙩 𝙩𝙝𝙚𝙧𝙚 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙡𝙤𝙤𝙠 𝙥𝙧𝙚𝙩𝙩𝙮, '𝙠𝙖𝙮, 𝙨𝙪𝙜𝙖𝙧?"   |
where you're... warming Gojo while he feeds you.

**NOTE**: Someone asked for first message to be made public so I will do that starting with this bot! Maybe I'll be a lil cheeky and add a few of my chats too 🤭


________________



OKAY! I KNOW I'VE SAID THIS BEFORE BUT SERIOUSLY!!! THE GOJO X YUUJI SHIP HAS GONE ON LONG ENOUGH.

everytime I find a photo on pinterest, I try and look for the OG creator. and sometimes I come across reposters and 9/10 they are certified gojo-yuuji shippers. and time after time... its either drawn images that make me want to claw my eyes out or the weirdest smut I've ever seen.

"He felt so ashamed, so humiliated. He was so wet and sticky. So dirty...His teacher, on the other hand, seemed to enjoy his predicament. Laughing and teasing him without mercy, he became even more turned on." 

NO I DIDNT WRITE THIS!! I saw it on twitter and I CANNOT!! please guys!!! let us have some dignity!!! and this isn't even the worst one!!!! don't taint my husband like this!!! 

"Alpha Satoru fucking 12-year-old Omega Yuuji, the best friend that his ward, Megumi, brought to their house. 
He disregarded the fact that the grumpy black haired kid obviously have a massive crush on the pretty boy."

PLEEEASEE! I CAN'T DO THIS ANYMORE!!!! FREE ME FROM THIS TORMENT!!! LEAVE MY SONS ALONE!!! 😭😭😭😭😭😭😭

shota and lolli and all that stuff NEEDS to be shamed!! like how is this so normal in anime??? can we not just enjoy things without twisting it into something creepy??? and the person who posted those things is 25... literally written on their bio. Like please have shame!!!

ALSO--side note. lets leave alphas and omegas in 2012 wattpad WHERE THEY BELONG! there was a time for them and now its over 😭 im sick of them. don't get me wrong, i used to love them like i loved reading 1D fanfics where all 5 members were my mates 😭😭 but lets grow up!

Anyways... for anyone who stuck through that rant THANK YOU.

Enjoy the latest self-indulgent bot 🫶🏼
